description: CompositionNavy blue jersey made of 100% polyester, has a mock collar, half zipped opening at front, short sleeves, DD logo on the left chest, branding on front and mesh panel on the back for ventilationFitRegularWash careMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironCrank up your little one's style as the cricket craze kicks off this summer with this Delhi Daredevils Match Jersey from adidas. The apple of your eye will be displaying Delhi pride with this jersey as you cheer your team at the IPL. There's no better way of saying 'Go Daredevils!' than with this jersey!
